Brightpath Creative

We help mission-driven brands tell their story. Based in Portland, OR — working everywhere.

Open Roles

Senior Copywriter

Portland, OR / Remote · Full-time · Content Team

Craft compelling narratives for our nonprofit and B-Corp clients. You'll lead brand voice development, write long-form content, and mentor junior writers.

Compensation: $95,000 – $120,000/year

Apply Now

UX Designer

Remote (US) · Full-time · Design Team

Design intuitive digital experiences for social impact organizations. Collaborate with developers and strategists from concept to launch.

Apply Now

Project Coordinator

Portland, OR · Part-time · Operations

Keep our creative projects on track. Manage timelines, coordinate with clients, and support the team in delivering outstanding work.

Compensation: $28–$35/hour

Apply Now
